name: BMAD Claw
description: Unofficial BMAD bridge for OpenClaw. Scaffolds BMAD personas (Mary, John, Barry, etc.) as global OpenClaw agents with freestyle identity, session hooks, and workflow tools. Optionally installs BMAD from scratch.

bmadHome.description: Absolute path to _bmad directory. Set automatically by bmad install or bmad config set-home.

boundAgents.description: Agent IDs managed by this plugin.

defaultMode.description: full = BMAD workflows available; persona-only = personality only, no workflows.
